text:
All 5 UI optimization tasks are complete. Here is a summary of changes:

## 1. Created `frontend/src/utils/imageUtils.js`
- `getWhiskyPlaceholder(whisky)` - Generates a beautiful SVG data URL with a whisky bottle outline, initials from the whisky name, and a type label. Colors vary by whisky type (single_malt=amber, bourbon=orange-red, irish=green, japanese=blue, etc.)
- `handleImageError(event, whisky)` - For direct @error binding on img tags
- Note: Another agent also added `getBrandLogoPlaceholder()` and `getBrandBackgroundFallback()` functions to this same file (via linter/concurrent edit)

## 2. Rewrote `frontend/src/components/whisky/WhiskyCard.vue`
- Added `imageLoaded` / `imageError` refs controlling shimmer skeleton and SVG placeholder fallback
- Shimmer animation on image area until load completes
- On error, displays the generated SVG placeholder instead of a broken image
- Added `age_years` badge display (amber badge showing e.g. "12yr")
- Improved rating display with review count in parentheses `(42)`
- Better star rendering with half-star support
- Enhanced card shadow and hover effects (amber-tinted box-shadow, translateY lift)
- Price section with subtle amber separator line
- Removed all console.log statements
- Consistent rounded-xl styling matching the glassmorphism design language

## 3. Optimized `frontend/src/views/HomePage.vue`
- Removed all 3 console.log debug statements (lines 148, 151, 152)
- Added Hero Stats inline display: "2634+ Whiskies | 10+ Retailers | AI Powered"
- Added Statistics Section (between hero and features): 3 stat cards with animated counting effect (ease-out cubic easing, staggered 200ms delays) showing: 2634+ Whiskies, 10+ Retailers, 95% AI Accuracy
- Added "View All" button with arrow icon in the Popular Whiskies section header, linking to /explore
- Stat cards have hover lift effect and amber-tinted shadows

## 4. Rewrote `frontend/src/components/whisky/WhiskyCardSkeleton.vue`
- Now matches WhiskyCard layout exactly: aspect-[3/4] image, title lines, type/region pills, star placeholders, price area
- Proper shimmer animation (translateX sweep) instead of simple opacity pulse
- Uses same rounded-xl and shadow styling as WhiskyCard
- Glassmorphism-compatible (bg-white/80 backdrop-blur)

## 5. Enhanced `frontend/src/components/whisky/TrendingCard.vue`
- Added shimmer loading + SVG placeholder fallback (same pattern as WhiskyCard)
- Replaced `Math.random()` trend percentage with stable hash-based pseudo-random (consistent across renders, based on whisky.id)
- Added price trend direction badge overlay on image (green "Price dropping" / red "Price rising" with arrow icons)
- Added original price strikethrough when discounted
- Added price trend text label in the price section
- Matching card styling: rounded-xl, amber-tinted shadows, hover lift
- Shows Chinese name if available

All components maintain the existing Tailwind CSS + Glassmorphism design language with amber color scheme. No emojis used. Vue 3 Composition API throughout.

Image fix task completed. Here is a summary of all files modified: ## Files Modified ### 1. `frontend/src/utils/imageUtils.js` (Extended) - Added `getBrandLogoPlaceholder(brand)` - generates circular amber gradient SVG with brand initial - Added `getBrandBackgroundFallback(brand)` - generates consistent amber/copper gradient CSS for brand hero backgrounds - Added `handleBrandLogoError(event, brand)` - convenience handler for brand logo errors ### 2. `frontend/src/components/brand/BrandCard.vue` - Added `@error="onLogoError"` handler to brand logo `` - When logo fails: hides broken img (opacity-0), shows amber gradient circle with brand initial - Uses reactive `logoError` ref instead of DOM manipulation ### 3. `frontend/src/views/BrandList.vue` - Replaced DOM-manipulating `handleLogoError` with reactive `logoErrors` object - `v-if="brand.logo_url && !logoErrors[brand.id]"` toggles between logo and emblem fallback - Clean Vue-reactive approach instead of `document.createElement` ### 4. `frontend/src/views/BrandDetail.vue` - Hero logo: `@error="onLogoError"` with reactive `logoError` ref, falls back to initial text - Hero background: preloads background image via `new Image()`, falls back to `getBrandBackgroundFallback()` gradient on error - Whisky product images: reactive `whiskyImageErrors` object, falls back to `getWhiskyPlaceholder()` SVG ### 5. `frontend/src/components/whisky/RecommendationCard.vue` - Added `@error="onImageError"` and reactive `imageError` ref - Falls back to `getWhiskyPlaceholder()` SVG bottle placeholder ### 6. `frontend/src/components/whisky/TrendingCard.vue` - Added `@error="onImageError"` and reactive `imageError` ref - Falls back to `getWhiskyPlaceholder()` SVG bottle placeholder - (Also updated by linter to improved card design with shimmer loading) ### 7. `frontend/src/components/whisky/ValueCard.vue` - Added `@error="onImageError"` and reactive `imageError` ref - Falls back to `getWhiskyPlaceholder()` SVG bottle placeholder ### 8. `frontend/src/views/WhiskyDetail.vue` - Added skeleton loading state (spinner) while image loads - Smooth opacity transition on image load (`@load="onImageLoad"`) - Falls back to large `getWhiskyPlaceholder()` SVG on error - Resets `imageLoaded`/`imageError` state on route changes between whiskies ### 9. `frontend/src/App.vue` - Replaced plain "W" text logo with SVG whisky glass/bottle icon (stroke-based, amber gradient background) ### 10. `frontend/src/components/whisky/WhiskyListItem.vue` - Added `@error="onImageError"` and reactive `imageError` ref - Falls back to `getWhiskyPlaceholder()` SVG bottle placeholder ## Approach Summary - All components use **reactive Vue state** (refs/reactive objects) instead of DOM manipulation - Every `` tag has an `@error` handler - Whisky images fall back to SVG bottle placeholders with type-appropriate colors and initials - Brand logos fall back to amber gradient circles with brand initials - Brand backgrounds fall back to amber/copper gradient - WhiskyDetail page has skeleton loading + smooth opacity transition - No emojis used, code in English, Tailwind CSS maintained
summary: All image fixes completed - 10 files modified
